content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about your favorite free-time activities.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about what you like to do in your free time. Listen carefully and give full answers. Try to explain your reasons.
examiner_questions: What do you usually do in your free time?
Do you prefer indoor activities or outdoor activities? Why?
What is the most fun thing you did last weekend?
content.sample_answer: In my free time, I usually read books or play computer games. Sometimes I go swimming with my friends. I prefer outdoor activities because I like fresh air and exercise. It makes me feel happy and healthy. Last weekend, I went to the beach with my family. We played in the water and built sandcastles. It was really fun because the weather was perfect.
content.tips_zh: 话题讨论时，不要只回答 'yes' 或 'no'，要给出原因和细节。使用 'because'、'for example' 来扩展你的回答。如果不确定某个词怎么说，可以用简单的词来解释。保持自信，即使犯了错误也继续说下去。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论。考官会围绕一个话题问你几个问题，你需要给出有内容的回答。重点是展示你能就日常话题表达看法和给出理由。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion. The examiner asks several questions around a topic, and you need to give substantive answers. The focus is on showing you can express opinions and give reasons about everyday topics.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about food and eating.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about food and eating. Listen carefully and give full answers. Try to explain your reasons and give examples.
examiner_questions: What kind of food do you like best?
Do you think it's important to eat healthy food? Why?
Do you prefer eating at home or in a restaurant? Why?
What's the best meal you've ever had?
content.sample_answer: I like Chinese food best, especially noodles and dumplings. Yes, I think eating healthy food is very important because it helps us grow strong and gives us energy for school. I prefer eating at home because my mother is a very good cook and the food is always fresh. The best meal I've ever had was a birthday dinner at a Japanese restaurant. We had sushi and it was delicious. I tried many new things that day.
content.tips_zh: 讨论食物话题时，要说具体的食物名称，不要太笼统。回答 "Do you think..." 的问题时，先说 "Yes, I think..." 或 "No, I don't think..."，然后给出理由。描述过去的经历用过去时态。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于食物和饮食。需要表达对食物的看法、饮食偏好和过去的经历。使用食物相关词汇和不同时态来回答不同类型的问题。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about food and eating. Express opinions about food, eating preferences, and past experiences. Use food-related vocabulary and different tenses for different question types.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about sports and exercise.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about sports and exercise. Listen carefully and give full answers. Share your opinions and experiences.
examiner_questions: What sports do you enjoy playing or watching?
Do you think exercise is important for young people? Why?
Have you ever tried a new sport? What was it like?
Would you like to learn a new sport in the future? Which one?
content.sample_answer: I enjoy playing basketball and I also like watching football on TV. Yes, I think exercise is very important for young people because it keeps us healthy and strong. It also helps us relax after studying. Last year, I tried swimming for the first time. At first, I was a bit scared of the deep water, but my coach was very kind and helped me. Now I really enjoy it. In the future, I'd like to learn tennis because it looks exciting and I can play it with my friends.
content.tips_zh: 讨论运动话题时，要说明自己喜欢什么运动以及为什么。回答关于过去经历的问题时，用过去时态并描述感受。回答关于未来的问题时，用 "I'd like to..." 或 "I want to..."。每个回答尽量说三到四句话。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于运动和锻炼。需要讨论运动喜好、运动的重要性、过去的尝试和未来的计划。注意使用不同时态回答不同时间的问题。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about sports and exercise. Discuss your sport preferences, the importance of exercise, past experiences, and future plans. Use different tenses for questions about different time periods.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about school and learning.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about school and learning. Listen carefully and give full answers with reasons.
examiner_questions: What is the best thing about your school?
Which school subject do you think is the most useful? Why?
Do you prefer working alone or in a group at school?
What would you change about your school if you could?
How do you study for a test?
content.sample_answer: The best thing about my school is the teachers — they are very friendly and always help us when we have problems. I think English is the most useful subject because we can use it to talk to people from other countries. I prefer working in a group because I can learn from my classmates and it's more fun. If I could change something, I would make the lunch break longer so we have more time to rest. When I study for a test, I read my notes and then I ask my parents to quiz me. I also write the important things on cards to help me remember.
content.tips_zh: 讨论学校话题时，要表达真实的看法。回答 "What would you change..." 用虚拟语气 "I would..."。描述学习方法时，用具体的步骤说明你是怎么做的。每个回答给出理由，使用 "because" 连接原因。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于学校和学习。需要讨论学校的优点、有用的科目、学习方式和改进建议。注意使用 "I think... because..." 表达看法，"I would..." 表达假设。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about school and learning. Discuss school positives, useful subjects, study methods, and improvements. Use 'I think... because...' for opinions and 'I would...' for hypothetical changes.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about technology.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about technology and how you use it. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: How often do you use a computer or tablet?
What do you use the internet for?
Do you think technology is good for students? Why or why not?
Do your parents have rules about how much time you can spend on your phone?
content.sample_answer: I use a computer almost every day, usually after I finish my homework. I use the internet for many things — I watch videos, listen to music, and sometimes I search for information for school projects. I think technology is good for students in some ways because we can learn new things online and practise our English with apps. But too much screen time is not good for our eyes. Yes, my parents have rules — I can only use my phone for one hour on school days, but at the weekend I can use it for a bit longer.
content.tips_zh: 讨论科技话题时，可以从正反两面谈。用 "I think... is good because..." 说优点，用 "But..." 说缺点。描述频率用 "almost every day"、"sometimes" 等词。说规则时用 "I can only..." 或 "I'm allowed to..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于科技。需要讨论使用科技的频率、用途、对学生的影响以及家长的规定。注意从正反两面回答问题，展示均衡的看法。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about technology. Discuss how often you use technology, what for, its impact on students, and parental rules. Answer from both positive and negative perspectives to show balanced views.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about your family and home life.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about your family and life at home. Listen carefully and give full answers with details.
examiner_questions: What do you and your family like to do together?
Do you help with housework at home? What do you do?
Tell me about a happy family memory.
Is it important to spend time with your family? Why?
content.sample_answer: My family likes to watch films together on Friday evenings. We also go for walks in the park at weekends. Yes, I help with housework at home — I wash the dishes after dinner and I keep my room tidy. Sometimes I help my mother cook on Sundays. A happy family memory is when we went to Disneyland last summer. We went on lots of rides and my little sister was so excited. We took many photos and had a wonderful time. Yes, I think it's very important to spend time with your family because they love you and you can have fun together. It also makes everyone feel closer.
content.tips_zh: 讨论家庭话题时，可以说具体的活动和例子。描述家务时，列举你做的事情。说到回忆时，使用过去时态描述具体的经历。回答 "Is it important..." 的问题时，先表明态度再给出理由。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于家庭和家庭生活。需要讨论家庭活动、家务、美好回忆和家庭时间的重要性。注意使用具体的例子和细节来丰富你的回答。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about family and home life. Discuss family activities, housework, happy memories, and the importance of family time. Use specific examples and details to enrich your answers.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about holidays and travel.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about holidays and travelling. Listen carefully and give full answers. Share your experiences and opinions.
examiner_questions: Where did you go on your last holiday?
What do you enjoy most about going on holiday?
Do you prefer holidays in your own country or going abroad? Why?
Where would you most like to go on holiday? Why?
What do you think is the best way to travel — by plane, train, or car?
content.sample_answer: On my last holiday, I went to Beijing with my parents. We visited the Great Wall and the Forbidden City. What I enjoy most about holidays is trying new food and seeing new places. I've never been abroad, but I would like to try in the future. For now, I prefer holidays in China because there are so many beautiful places to see. I would most like to go to Australia because I want to see kangaroos and the Sydney Opera House. I think the best way to travel is by train because you can look out of the window and see the countryside. It's also very comfortable.
content.tips_zh: 讨论假期话题时，注意使用不同时态：过去的假期用过去时，一般喜好用现在时，未来计划用 "would like to" 或 "want to"。比较不同选项时用 "I prefer... because..."。可以加入具体的地名和活动来丰富回答。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于假期和旅行。需要讨论过去的旅行经历、旅行偏好和未来的旅行计划。注意使用不同时态和比较表达。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about holidays and travel. Discuss past travel experiences, travel preferences, and future travel plans. Use different tenses and comparative expressions.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about your friends and social life.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about friends and spending time with other people. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: What do you like to do with your friends?
How do you keep in touch with friends who don't live near you?
Is it easy or difficult to make new friends? Why?
What qualities are important in a friend?
Tell me about something fun you did with your friends recently.
content.sample_answer: I like to play sports and go to the cinema with my friends. Sometimes we just sit and talk in the park. To keep in touch with friends who live far away, I use WeChat to send messages and sometimes we do video calls. I think it's quite easy to make new friends at school because you see the same people every day. But it can be difficult if you are shy. I think the most important qualities in a friend are being honest and being kind. A good friend should also make you laugh. Recently, my friends and I went to a water park. We went on the big slides and splashed each other in the pool. We laughed so much — it was a really great day.
content.tips_zh: 讨论朋友话题时，要表达自己的看法并举例说明。回答 "Is it easy or difficult..." 时，可以说两方面，用 "But" 来转折。描述最近的经历用过去时态。使用 "I think the most important..." 来表达你认为什么品质最重要。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于朋友和社交生活。需要讨论和朋友的活动、保持联系的方式、交友的难易程度和朋友的重要品质。注意从正反两面分析问题，并用具体例子支持你的观点。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about friends and social life. Discuss activities with friends, staying in touch, making new friends, and important qualities. Analyse from different angles and support opinions with specific examples.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about the environment.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about the environment and taking care of our planet. Listen carefully and give full answers with examples.
examiner_questions: Do you think the environment is important? Why?
What do you do to help the environment?
Does your school do anything to help the environment?
What is the biggest environmental problem in your area?
What can young people do to make the world a better place?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I think the environment is very important because it's our home and we need clean air and water to be healthy. I try to help the environment by recycling paper and plastic, and I always use a reusable water bottle instead of buying plastic ones. Yes, my school has recycling bins in every classroom and we sometimes plant trees on special days. I think the biggest problem in my area is too much rubbish on the streets. Some people throw their rubbish on the ground instead of putting it in the bin. I think young people can help by picking up litter, saving energy at home, and telling their friends about why it's important to look after our planet.
content.tips_zh: 讨论环境话题时，先表明态度（"I think it's important because..."），然后说你做了什么（"I try to help by..."）。列举学校的做法和当地的问题。回答关于年轻人能做什么时，给出具体的行动建议。使用 "by + doing" 来描述方法。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于环境保护。需要讨论环境的重要性、个人和学校的环保行动、当地的环境问题和年轻人的责任。使用 "by doing" 描述方法，给出具体例子。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about the environment. Discuss the importance of the environment, personal and school actions, local problems, and young people's responsibilities. Use 'by doing' for methods and give specific examples.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about shopping.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about shopping and money. Listen carefully and give full answers. Share your experiences and opinions.
examiner_questions: Do you like shopping? Why or why not?
What do you usually spend your money on?
Do you prefer shopping online or in a real shop? Why?
Do you think young people spend too much money? Why or why not?
What is the best thing you have ever bought?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I quite like shopping, especially for books and clothes. It's fun to look at new things. I usually spend my money on snacks, stationery for school, and sometimes books. I prefer shopping in real shops because I can see and touch things before I buy them. Online shopping is convenient, but sometimes the things look different from the photos. I think some young people spend too much money on things they don't really need, like expensive toys or the latest phone. It's important to save some money too. The best thing I have ever bought was a skateboard. I saved my pocket money for three months to buy it. I use it almost every day and it makes me really happy.
content.tips_zh: 讨论购物话题时，说出具体你喜欢买什么和花钱的习惯。比较线上和线下购物时用 "I prefer... because..."。表达对年轻人花钱的看法时，用 "I think..." 并给出理由。描述买过的最好的东西用过去时态，说明为什么它对你重要。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于购物和金钱。需要讨论购物喜好、花钱习惯、购物方式偏好和对年轻人消费的看法。用具体例子支持观点。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about shopping and money. Discuss shopping preferences, spending habits, shopping method preferences, and views on young people's spending. Support opinions with specific examples.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about animals.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about animals. Listen carefully and give full answers. Share your opinions and experiences.
examiner_questions: What is your favourite animal and why?
Do you think it's a good idea to keep animals in zoos? Why or why not?
Have you ever had a pet or looked after an animal?
What can we do to help protect animals?
If you could be any animal for a day, what would you be?
content.sample_answer: My favourite animal is the dolphin because they are very clever and friendly. They can do amazing tricks and they always look like they are smiling. I think zoos are OK if they look after the animals well and the animals have enough space. But I don't like it when animals are kept in small cages. My grandmother has a cat called Mimi. When I visit her, I help feed the cat and play with it. I think we can protect animals by not throwing rubbish in the sea and by supporting animal charities. We should also not buy things made from animal fur. If I could be an animal for a day, I would be a bird because I would love to fly in the sky and see everything from above!
content.tips_zh: 讨论动物话题时，说出你喜欢的动物及理由。讨论动物园时可以说正反两面。描述照顾动物的经历用过去时或现在时。说到保护动物的措施时，给出具体建议。回答假设问题时用 "I would be... because..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于动物。需要讨论最喜欢的动物、动物园的看法、养宠物的经历和保护动物的方法。注意从不同角度分析问题，使用假设语气回答想象类问题。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about animals. Discuss favourite animals, views on zoos, pet experiences, and animal protection. Analyse from different angles and use conditional forms for hypothetical questions.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about your future plans.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about your future and what you want to do when you are older. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: What job would you like to do when you are older?
Why do you want to do that job?
What do you need to study to do that job?
Where would you like to live in the future?
What do you think your life will be like in ten years?
content.sample_answer: When I am older, I would like to be a doctor because I want to help people who are sick. I think being a doctor is a very important and meaningful job. To become a doctor, I need to study science and biology at school, and then go to medical school at university. In the future, I would like to live in a big city because there are more hospitals and more opportunities. I think in ten years, I will be at university studying hard. I hope I will have good friends and still enjoy playing basketball. I also hope I can travel to different countries to learn about medicine.
content.tips_zh: 讨论未来计划时，用 "I would like to be..." 或 "I want to be..." 表达职业理想。说明原因用 "because"。描述需要学什么用 "I need to study..."。谈论未来生活用 "I think I will..." 和 "I hope I will..."。给出具体的计划和理由让回答更充实。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于未来计划。需要讨论理想职业、选择原因、需要的学习和未来生活。使用 "would like to"、"will" 和 "hope" 表达未来的愿望和预期。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about future plans. Discuss ideal jobs, reasons for choosing, required studies, and future life. Use 'would like to', 'will', and 'hope' to express future wishes and expectations.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about music and entertainment.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about music and entertainment. Listen carefully and give full answers with examples.
examiner_questions: What kind of music do you like? Why?
Have you ever been to a concert or a live show?
Do you think music is important in our lives? Why?
Would you like to learn to play a musical instrument? Which one?
What do you do for entertainment at the weekend?
content.sample_answer: I like pop music because it has a good beat and makes me feel happy. I also like some classical music — it helps me concentrate when I'm studying. No, I have never been to a concert, but I would really like to go to one. I think music is very important in our lives because it can change our mood. When I am sad, I listen to happy music and I feel better. When I want to relax, I listen to slow music. I would like to learn to play the guitar because I think it's cool and I can play songs for my friends. At the weekend, I usually watch films, play games with my friends, or go for a walk in the park.
content.tips_zh: 讨论音乐和娱乐话题时，说出具体的音乐类型和原因。回答 "Have you ever..." 用现在完成时。讨论音乐的重要性时，举具体例子说明音乐对你的影响。用 "I would like to learn..." 表达学习愿望。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于音乐和娱乐。需要讨论音乐品味、演唱会经历、音乐的重要性和娱乐活动。注意用具体例子说明音乐对生活的影响。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about music and entertainment. Discuss music tastes, concert experiences, the importance of music, and entertainment activities. Use specific examples to show how music affects your life.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about keeping healthy.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about health and staying healthy. Listen carefully and give full answers with reasons.
examiner_questions: What do you do to stay healthy?
Do you think young people today are healthy? Why or why not?
What is the most important thing for good health — exercise, good food, or sleep?
Have you ever been ill? What happened?
What advice would you give to someone who wants to be healthier?
content.sample_answer: To stay healthy, I try to eat lots of fruit and vegetables and I exercise regularly. I play basketball three times a week and I go for a run at weekends. I think some young people are healthy, but others aren't because they eat too much fast food and don't exercise enough. They also spend too much time sitting and looking at screens. I think the most important thing for good health is exercise because it makes your body strong and your mind clear. But good food and sleep are very important too — you need all three. Last winter, I had the flu and I felt terrible. I had a high temperature and couldn't go to school for a week. My advice for someone who wants to be healthier is to start small — maybe walk to school instead of taking the bus, and eat an apple instead of sweets.
content.tips_zh: 讨论健康话题时，说出你具体做了什么来保持健康。讨论年轻人的健康状况时，从正反两面分析。比较不同的健康因素时，先选一个最重要的，然后说其他的也重要。描述生病经历用过去时态。给建议时用 "My advice is to..." 或 "I think they should..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于保持健康。需要讨论你的健康习惯、年轻人的健康状况、最重要的健康因素、生病经历和健康建议。注意从多角度分析问题。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about keeping healthy. Discuss your health habits, young people's health, the most important health factor, illness experiences, and health advice. Analyse from multiple angles.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about books and reading.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about books and reading. Listen carefully and give full answers. Share your experiences and opinions.
examiner_questions: Do you enjoy reading? What kind of books?
What is the best book you have ever read? What was it about?
Do you think reading is important for young people? Why?
Do you prefer reading books or watching films? Why?
Is there a book you would like to read in the future?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I enjoy reading very much. I like adventure stories and mystery books because they are very exciting and I always want to know what happens next. The best book I have ever read is Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone. It's about a boy who discovers he is a wizard and goes to a magic school. I loved it because the characters are so interesting and the world is magical. Yes, I think reading is very important for young people because it helps us learn new words, use our imagination, and understand other people's feelings. I prefer reading books to watching films because when I read, I can imagine everything in my own way. In the future, I would like to read more books in English because it will help me improve my language skills.
content.tips_zh: 讨论阅读话题时，说出具体的书名和类型。描述一本书时，简要说明内容（"It's about..."）和你喜欢的原因。讨论阅读的重要性时，列出几个具体原因。比较阅读和看电影时用 "I prefer... because..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于阅读和书籍。需要讨论阅读喜好、最喜欢的书、阅读的重要性和未来的阅读计划。用 "It's about..." 描述书的内容，用 "because" 给出理由。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about books and reading. Discuss reading preferences, favourite books, the importance of reading, and future reading plans. Use 'It's about...' for book content and 'because' for reasons.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about your town or city.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about the place where you live. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: Can you tell me about the town or city where you live?
What is the best thing about living there?
What is there to do for young people in your area?
Is there anything you don't like about where you live?
Would you like to live somewhere else? Where?
content.sample_answer: I live in a medium-sized city. It's not too big and not too small. There are lots of shops, restaurants, and a big park in the centre. The best thing about living here is that there are many things to do — we have a cinema, a sports centre, and a nice library. For young people, there are sports clubs, a swimming pool, and a skate park. We can also go shopping at the weekend. One thing I don't like is that the traffic can be very bad, especially in the morning when everyone is going to work or school. The buses are often late. If I could live somewhere else, I would like to live near the sea because I love the beach and swimming. I think living near the sea would be very relaxing.
content.tips_zh: 描述你的城市时，先说基本情况（大小），然后说优点、可以做什么、缺点。使用 "There are..." 列举设施。说缺点时用 "One thing I don't like is..."。说想住的地方时用 "I would like to live...because..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于你住的城市。需要描述你的城市、讨论优缺点和年轻人的娱乐活动。用 "There are" 列举设施，用 "I would like to" 表达愿望。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about your town or city. Describe your city, discuss pros and cons, and entertainment for young people. Use 'There are' for facilities and 'I would like to' for wishes.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about celebrations and festivals.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about celebrations and special days. Listen carefully and give full answers with details.
examiner_questions: What is your favourite celebration or festival?
How does your family celebrate it?
What special food do you eat during this celebration?
Do you think celebrations are important? Why?
Tell me about a celebration you enjoyed recently.
content.sample_answer: My favourite celebration is Chinese New Year because the whole family gets together and it's very exciting. My family celebrates it by having a big dinner on New Year's Eve. All my grandparents, aunts, uncles, and cousins come to our house. We eat special food like dumplings, fish, and spring rolls. Dumplings are my favourite because they taste delicious and they mean good luck. Yes, I think celebrations are very important because they bring families together and give us happy memories. They also help us remember our traditions and culture. Last Chinese New Year was wonderful. We watched the fireworks together and I got red envelopes with lucky money. My little cousin was so funny — he did a dragon dance with a paper dragon he made at school!
content.tips_zh: 讨论节日和庆祝活动时，描述具体的庆祝方式和特色食物。使用 "My family celebrates it by..." 描述庆祝方式。讨论节日的重要性时，说明它对家庭和文化的意义。描述最近的庆祝经历用过去时态，加入有趣的细节让描述更生动。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于节日和庆祝活动。需要讨论最喜欢的节日、庆祝方式、特色食物和节日的重要性。用具体的描述和有趣的细节让回答更生动。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about celebrations and festivals. Discuss favourite celebrations, how you celebrate, special food, and the importance of celebrations. Use specific descriptions and interesting details to make answers vivid.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about transport and getting around.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about transport and how you travel. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: How do you usually get to school?
What is your favourite way to travel? Why?
Do you think there is too much traffic in your city?
Have you ever been on a long journey? Tell me about it.
What do you think transport will be like in the future?
content.sample_answer: I usually get to school by bus. It takes about twenty minutes. Sometimes when the weather is nice, I ride my bike. My favourite way to travel is by train because I can look out of the window and watch the world go by. It's also very comfortable — you can walk around, read a book, or just relax. Yes, I think there is too much traffic in my city, especially during rush hour in the morning. The roads are very busy and it takes a long time to get anywhere. Last summer, my family took a train to Shanghai. It was a five-hour journey. I read books, played games on my phone, and slept. When we arrived, I was excited to see the tall buildings and the river. I think in the future, there will be more electric cars and maybe even flying taxis! That would be amazing.
content.tips_zh: 讨论交通话题时，说出你平时怎么去学校、喜欢的出行方式。讨论交通问题时用 "I think there is too much..."。描述长途旅行的经历用过去时态。讨论未来的交通用 "I think there will be..."。每个回答加入具体细节。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于交通出行。需要讨论日常出行方式、喜欢的旅行方式、交通问题和未来交通。注意使用不同时态描述过去经历和未来预测。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about transport. Discuss daily travel methods, favourite travel ways, traffic problems, and future transport. Use different tenses for past experiences and future predictions.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about clothes and fashion.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about clothes and how you dress. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: What kind of clothes do you usually wear?
Do you have a favourite piece of clothing? Why do you like it?
Do you think a school uniform is a good idea? Why or why not?
Do you follow fashion trends?
How important is it to you what you wear?
content.sample_answer: I usually wear casual clothes like jeans, T-shirts, and trainers because they are comfortable. In winter, I wear a warm jacket and a scarf. My favourite piece of clothing is my blue hoodie because it's really soft and comfortable. My mum bought it for me last birthday. I think school uniforms are a good idea because everyone looks the same and nobody feels bad about their clothes. It also means you don't need to spend time choosing what to wear every morning. But some people think uniforms are boring. I don't really follow fashion trends because I prefer to wear what's comfortable. Sometimes I see something I like on social media, but I don't buy something just because it's popular. I think it's not very important what you wear — the most important thing is that you feel comfortable and happy in your clothes.
content.tips_zh: 讨论服装话题时，描述你平时穿什么和为什么。讨论校服时可以从正反两面说。"I think... is a good idea because..." 表达支持，"But some people think..." 提供不同观点。说到时尚时表达你的个人态度。用 "the most important thing is..." 总结你的看法。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于服装和时尚。需要讨论日常穿着、最喜欢的衣服、校服的看法和对时尚的态度。注意从多角度讨论校服的利弊。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about clothes and fashion. Discuss daily clothing, favourite items, views on school uniforms, and attitude towards fashion. Discuss the pros and cons of uniforms from multiple angles.

content.stem: Topic Discussion — Talk about dreams and imagination.
content.prompt: The examiner will ask you questions about dreams, imagination, and things you wish for. Listen carefully and give full answers.
examiner_questions: What do you dream about for the future?
If you could have one superpower, what would it be?
What would you do if you won a lot of money?
Do you think it's good to have big dreams? Why?
If you could meet anyone in the world, who would you meet?
content.sample_answer: For the future, I dream about becoming a scientist and making new discoveries that help people. I would love to find a way to make clean energy for everyone. If I could have one superpower, I would choose the ability to fly because I want to see the world from above and travel anywhere quickly without needing a plane. If I won a lot of money, I would first give some to my parents because they work so hard. Then I would save some for university and donate some to charity. I would also buy lots of books! Yes, I think it's very good to have big dreams because they give you something to work towards. Even if you don't achieve everything, you still try your best and learn a lot. If I could meet anyone in the world, I would meet a famous scientist like Marie Curie because she was so brave and clever. I would ask her how she kept going when things were difficult.
content.tips_zh: 讨论梦想和想象力话题时，使用虚拟语气 "If I could... I would..." 来回答假设性问题。描述未来梦想用 "I dream about..." 和 "I would love to..."。讨论为什么有梦想是好事时，给出深思熟虑的理由。可以选择具体的人物来回答 "如果你能遇见任何人" 的问题。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第四部分——话题讨论，关于梦想和想象。需要讨论未来的梦想、超能力、如果赢得很多钱会做什么和想见的人。使用 "If I could... I would..." 来回答虚拟情境的问题。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 4 — Topic Discussion about dreams and imagination. Discuss future dreams, superpowers, what you'd do with money, and who you'd meet. Use 'If I could... I would...' for hypothetical scenarios.
